analyze.name: Database Schema Analyzer
analyze.description: Analyzes database schemas and generates comprehensive business glossaries
analyze.template: You are a business operational and organization data governance and compliance expert. Analyze this database schema and based on your deep business expertise given the case at hand, create a comprehensive business data glossary, category and terms to express the business. This should be based on the overall needs of the business inspired by the table names, column names, and their relationships of the data as an illustration. Based on this do your research and analyze the business at hand, and be modern and current and forward thinking on organization based on modern business trends and understanding. Develop the expansive, large complete long, comprehensive business glossary encompassing the data at hand interweaved and incorporated with your understanding of key business drivers of this business at hand. Make the business glossary, categories and business terms organized into a logical hierarchical structure. Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format: {{ "Root Glossary Name": [ {{ "Category Under Root": [ "Simple Leaf Term", {{ "Parent Leaf Term": [ "Nested Leaf Term" ] }} ] }} ] }} This is a sample: {{ "ARC Mobility Glossary": [ {{ "Compliance & Legal": [ "CCPA Compliance Status", "Consent Timestamp", "Cookie Consent Status", "Data Processing Agreement", "Data Retention Policy", "Data Subject Request", "Do Not Contact Flag", "Export Restriction Compliance", "GDPR Compliance Status", "Privacy Policy Version", "Product Certification", "Recall Status", "Terms of Service Agreement Date" ] }}, {{ "Customer Support & Service": [ "First Response Time", "NPS (Net Promoter Score)", "Resolution Time", "Support Channel", "Ticket Volume", "Warranty Claim Rate", "Warranty Information" ] }}, {{ "Customers": [ "Account Creation Date", "Billing Address", "Communication Preferences", "Customer ID", "Customer Satisfaction Score", "Customer Segment", "Email Address", "Full Name", "Phone Number", "Preferred Language", "Purchase History" ] }}, {{ "Data & Analytics": [ "Dashboard View", "Data Quality Score", "Data Source", "Data Warehouse", "ETL", "KPI" ] }}, {{ "Manufacturing & Operations": [ "Bill of Materials", "Cycle Time", "Defect Rate", "Downtime", "Production Line ID", "Work Order Number", "Yield Rate" ] }}, {{ "Marketing": [ "Attribution Model", "Conversion Rate", "Customer Acquisition Cost", "Engagement Rate", "Lead Source", "Promo Code Usage Rate" ] }}, {{ "Product & Engineering": [ "Battery Capacity", "Firmware Version", "Frame Type", "Model Number", "Motor Power", "Range", "SKUs", "Top Speed" ] }}, {{ "Sales & Finance": [ "Average Order Value", "Channel Performance", "Gross Margin", "MSRP", "Return Rate", "Revenue Recognition Date", "Customer Lifetime Value" ] }}, {{ "Supply Chain & Logistics": [ "Backorder Rate", "Inventory Turnover", "Lead Time", "Shipping SLA", "Supplier ID", "Warehousing Cost per Unit" ] }}, {{ "Technical & IoT": [ "Bluetooth Pairing ID", "Error Codes", "OTA Updates", "Telemetry Data" ] }} ] }} Use meaningful business terms derived from the schema. Schema to analyze: {schema_summary}

generate.name: Direct CSV Transformation
generate.description: Generate endpoint uses direct programmatic transformation (no AI prompt needed)
